gist.headline: Shell commands for humans
gist.blurb: Added 'fuckits' to the Dev Tools showcase. It's an AI CLI that turns your natural language requests into actual, working terminal commands.
gist.summary: A new AI-powered CLI tool has been added to the registry that translates natural language descriptions into executable shell scripts.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate complex terminal commands by simply describing what they want to achieve in plain English.
gist.visual_concept: A retro terminal scene where frustration turns to magic. The Monitor Robot is typing at a command prompt, while the Pollinations Bee waves a tiny wizard wand, transforming a thought bubble into clean lime-green code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head sitting at a retro terminal. The screen glows with lime green (#ecf874) command lines. The bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny pixelated wizard wand. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on screen: '>_ MAGIC'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
